title: × sorbaronia arsenii
parts: × sorbaronia arsenii has many medicinal parts, such as the leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain various bioactive compounds. The leaves of × sorbaronia arsenii contain flavonoids, including quercetin and kaempferol, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The roots of this plant contain saponins, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, while the flowers contain essential oils with potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Additionally, the roots of × sorbaronia arsenii also contain sesquiterpenoids, which have been studied for their potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
